expectations.evidence: Wrote inline Python using requests to call Pushover API. No reference to ~/scripts/notify.py.
Set priority to 0 in the request data.

expectations.text: Checks for required environment variables before sending
expectations.evidence: Checks if user_key and app_token are set before making the API call.

expectations.text: Reports success or failure of the notification delivery
expectations.evidence: Checks response.ok and prints 'Success!' or 'Failed: {response text}'.
